MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Rosemary Khoury, Esq. Kyle Nordrehaug, Esq. 213-622-4441 Parker Shafie LLP for Plaintiff.
Andrew Spurchise, Esq. Lisa Lin Garcia, Esq. 415-288-6369 Littler Mendelson for Defendant.
Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-274-9977, sheilapham28@yahoo.com, Reported.

Hearing is held. No one opposes the motion. Ms. Khoury informs the Court of the disposition of the settlement. The Court sets a subsequent date for distribution on 12/5/24 at 9:30am per agreement of all the parties. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ISHAN BASU-KESSELMAN's Motion For Approval Of Private Attorneys General Act PAGA Settlement.

Plaintiffs' unopposed motion for approval of Private Attorneys General Act settlement is granted. Ms. Khoury to submit a proposed order and include the hearing date for 12/5/24.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-274-9977, sheilapham28@yahoo.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
